Beats Solo Buds

Looks tiny. Sounds huge.

Original Price $79.99

Color: Arctic Purple

Beats Solo Buds

Original Price$79.99

  • Free Shipping and Returns

    Enjoy free 2-day delivery and 14-day returns.

  • In-store pickup

    Pick up your Beats at an Apple Store near you.

  • Free Apple Music trial

    Get 3 months of access to over 100 million songs, ad-free.3

Beats Solo Buds - True Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds

Fully Custom Acoustic Architecture

Fully Custom Acoustic Architecture

Fully Custom Acoustic Architecture

Ergonomic Design for a
Natural Fit

Ergonomic Design for a
Natural Fit

Ergonomic Design for a Natural Fit

Up to 18 Hours
of Battery Life2

Up to 18 Hours
of Battery Life2

Up to 18 Hours
of Battery Life2

Compatible with
iOS and Android

Compatible with
iOS and Android

Compatible with
iOS and Android

Sound

  • Custom-built acoustic architecture tuned for music first to deliver big Beats sound with full range and clarity
  • Dual-layer drivers minimize micro-distortions across the frequency curve, ensuring high-fidelity sound with uncompromising accuracy
  • Axial-aligned drivers are positioned parallel to the acoustic nozzle to deliver sound more directly to your ears

Design

  • The smallest, lightest case Beats has ever made
  • Ergonomically angled acoustic nozzles for a natural fit
  • Laser-cut vents engineered to improve bass performance while gently relieving air pressure for added comfort
  • Four eartip options (XS, S, M & L) to fit a wider range of ear sizes
  • Bud Specs:
    • Length: 2.05 cm / 0.81 in
    • Width: 1.85 cm / 0.73 in
    • Height: 1.9 cm / 0.75 in
    • Weight: 5.7 g
  • Case Specs:
    • Length: 6.6 cm / 2.6 in
    • Width: 3.5 cm / 1.4 in
    • Height: 2.4 cm / 0.9 in
    • Weight: 22 g

Connectivity

  • Dual compatibility with both iOS and Android devices right out of the box for seamless one-touch pairing, automatic pre-pairing across your devices, plus Find My or Find My Device4
  • Industry-leading Class 1 Bluetooth® for extended range and fewer dropouts
    • Bluetooth compatibility: Bluetooth 5.3
  • Exceptional call performance from leading-edge microphones powered by an advanced noise-learning algorithm

Power

  • Extended earbud battery life with up to 18 hours of playback2
  • With Fast Fuel, a quick 5-minute charge gives up to 1 hour of playback5
  • USB-C universal charging
  • Charge directly from your phone,6 tablet or laptop for extra power on the go
  • Rechargeable lithium-ion battery

Controls

  • Single multi-function button per side

In the Box

  • Beats Solo Buds earbuds
  • Carrying case
  • Eartips with four size options (XS, S, M, L)
  • Warranty card

(Power adapter and USB-C charging cable sold separately)

Packaging

  • Beats Solo Buds packaging is made from 100% plant-based material sourced from recycled fiber and/or sustainable forests7

Download transcript

Sound

Designed for music first.

Sound

Designed for music first.

Sound

Designed for music first.

Every design decision was focused on accurate music reproduction — from the drivers to the vents to the position of each intricate component inside.

The result? Cleanly balanced tuning that gives you the full range and emotion of all your music, as the artists intended.

          Pocket Size

          Our smallest case. Ever.

          Beats Solo Buds feature the tiniest case we’ve ever made, making these powerful earbuds the ultimate on-the-go companion.

              All about airflow.

              Each bud’s laser-cut vents are engineered to improve audio performance, especially for bass, while gently reducing air pressure for extra comfort.

              All about airflow.

              Each bud’s laser-cut vents are engineered to improve audio performance, especially for bass, while gently reducing air pressure for extra comfort.

              All about airflow.

              Each bud’s laser-cut vents are engineered to improve audio performance, especially for bass, while gently reducing air pressure for extra comfort.

              Fit

              Fit for any ear.

              Fit

              Fit for any ear.

              Fit

              Fit for any ear.

              The earbuds’ ergonomic design features nozzles angled to match the natural shape of the ear canal.

              Beats Solos Buds come with four ear tip sizes (XS, S, M, L) — including our newest extra-small option — to help ensure ultimate comfort and passive noise isolation.

              Beats Solos Buds come with four ear tip sizes (XS, S, M, L) — including our newest extra-small option — to help ensure ultimate comfort and passive noise isolation.

              Beats Solos Buds come with four ear tip sizes (XS, S, M, L) — including our newest extra-small option — to help ensure ultimate comfort and passive noise isolation.

              Battery

              Charge from your phone.6

              Or tablet. Or wall outlet. When it’s time to recharge, seat your earbuds in the case while connected to a USB-C cable.

              A 5-minute Fast Fuel charge provides up to 1 hour of listening time when you need it quick.5

              Up to 18 hours of battery life.

              With up to 18 hours of battery life2 and their comfortable ergonomic design, Beats Solo Buds are built for extended listening.

              Up to 18 hours of battery life.

              With up to 18 hours of battery life2 and their comfortable ergonomic design, Beats Solo Buds are built for extended listening.

              Up to 18 hours of battery life.

              With up to 18 hours of battery life2 and their comfortable ergonomic design, Beats Solo Buds are built for extended listening.

              Compatibility

              Works with iOS. And Android.

              Compatibility

              Works with iOS. And Android.

              Compatibility

              Works with iOS. And Android.

              Native compatibility ensures seamless one-touch pairing, automatic pre-pairing across your devices, plus Find My or Find My Device4 — for everyone.

              Call Quality

              Crystal-clear calls.

              Each earbud is equipped with a leading-edge microphone powered by an advanced noise-learning algorithm to help deliver exceptional call quality.

              Enjoy extended range with fewer dropouts thanks to industry-leading Class 1 Bluetooth®.

              Call Quality

              Crystal-clear calls.

              Each earbud is equipped with a leading-edge microphone powered by an advanced noise-learning algorithm to help deliver exceptional call quality.

              Enjoy extended range with fewer dropouts thanks to industry-leading Class 1 Bluetooth®.

              Call Quality

              Crystal-clear calls.

              Each earbud is equipped with a leading-edge microphone powered by an advanced noise-learning algorithm to help deliver exceptional call quality.

              Enjoy extended range with fewer dropouts thanks to industry-leading Class 1 Bluetooth®.

              Controls

              On-device controls.

              Customizable on-ear functions allow you to control your music, take calls and activate your voice assistant by pressing the ‘b’ button. You can also configure the ‘b’ button in iOS settings or your Beats app to control your volume (up on one side, down on the other).

              Controls

              On-device controls.

              Customizable on-ear functions allow you to control your music, take calls and activate your voice assistant by pressing the ‘b’ button. You can also configure the ‘b’ button in iOS settings or your Beats app to control your volume (up on one side, down on the other).

              Controls

              On-device controls.

              Customizable on-ear functions allow you to control your music, take calls and activate your voice assistant by pressing the ‘b’ button. You can also configure the ‘b’ button in iOS settings or your Beats app to control your volume (up on one side, down on the other).

              3 Months of Free Music For Your Beats3

              Beats headphones and Apple Music were made for each other.

              New subscribers can redeem a 3-month offer to start listening to over 100 million songs, ad-free.

              3 Months of Free Music For Your Beats3

              Footnotes

              1. Product may vary in color, details, and dimensions from 3D rendering. View on a device running the latest hardware and software for best results.
              2. Testing conducted by Apple in April 2024 using preproduction Beats Solo Buds units and software paired with iPhone 15 Pro units and pre-release software. The playlist consisted of 358 unique audio tracks purchased from the iTunes Store (256-Kbps AAC encoding). Volume was set to 50%. Testing consisted of full Beats Solo Buds battery discharge while playing audio until the first unit of Beats Solo Buds stopped playback. Battery life depends on device settings, environment, usage, and many other factors.
              3. New subscribers only. Offer available for a limited time to new subscribers who connect an eligible device to an Apple device running iOS 15 or iPadOS 15 or later. Offer good for 3 months after eligible device pairing. No audio product purchase necessary for current owners of eligible devices. Plan automatically renews at your region’s price per month until cancelled. Restrictions and other termsother terms (Opens in new window) apply.
              4. Requires an iCloud account and a compatible Apple device running the latest operating system software or a compatible Android device running the latest operating system software with Google Play Services enabled.
              5. Testing conducted by Apple in April 2024 using preproduction Beats Solo Buds units and software paired with iPhone 15 Pro units and pre-release software. The playlist consisted of 358 unique audio tracks purchased from the iTunes Store (256-Kbps AAC encoding). Volume was set to 50% and Active Noise Cancellation and Transparency were turned off. 5-minute charge testing conducted with drained Beats Solo Buds that were charged for 5 minutes, then audio playback was started until the first Beats Solo Buds stopped playback. Battery life depends on device settings, environment, usage and many other factors.
              6. Requires iPhone 15 or supported Android devices.
              7. Breakdown of U.S. retail packaging by weight. Adhesives, inks, and coatings are excluded from our calculations of plastic content and packaging weight.
